title: EgoMAN: Flowing from Reasoning to Motion: Learning 3D Hand Trajectory Prediction from Egocentric Human Interaction Videos
summary: EgoMAN introduces a large-scale dataset of 219K 6DoF hand trajectories and 3M structured QA pairs covering semantic, spatial, and motion reasoning, derived from egocentric human interaction videos. The accompanying model uses a reasoning-to-motion framework that links vision-language reasoning and motion generation via a trajectory-token interface, enabling 3D hand trajectory prediction grounded in structured natural-language reasoning about human manipulation.
